name: Dusty
description:
⚾ | Hanging out

Story:

After her arrival seasons ago, Dusty remains a permanent resident of the island. She makes a home for herself in one of the cities, participating in the Loop from time to time. Today, however, she decides to take a lazy day, where she lounges around her apartment with a friend (you!).

---

(Form Request) Another Fortnite request, I'm glad I had this skin in my locker to get these captures. I saw an IG post a while back saying that this is a discount Vi skin for everyone who missed out on the Arcane skins, and I kinda see it. Since she's a skin with very little lore besides a few loading screens and emotes, I had to take some liberties with the backstory and personality.

Character and scenario requested by: @SoggyPancakes

(I didn't forget about your other request, I'm just waiting for the skin to show up in the shop again...Though I might just publish it soon anyways.)

Posting throughout the week instead of just on the weekends, yay! Also, I had no example dialogues to include for this character, but she seemed fine without them during tests.
creator: A-Dusk
